mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark FROM borrow_record ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark FROM borrow_record WHERE card_no = #{cardNo} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark FROM borrow_record WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark FROM borrow_record WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark FROM borrow_record WHERE card_no = #{cardNo} AND status != '已归还' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (book_id, card_no, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, renew_count, remark) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{cardNo}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, #{status}, #{renewCount}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record SET return_date = #{returnDate}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE borrow_record SET due_date = #{dueDate}, renew_count = #{renewCount} WHERE id = #{id}
